content.content:
A 3-node Elasticsearch cluster is running.

Goal:
- Add two new data nodes with a different allocation attribute from the existing nodes.
- Ensure shards for index "app-data" relocate onto the new nodes.
- Keep the cluster healthy.

Constraints:
- Do not install operators or CRDs.

Verification:
1. Cluster health is yellow/green with 5 nodes.
2. app-data shards are present on nodes outside the original 3.
3. New nodes have a different allocation attribute than the original nodes.
4. es-cluster StatefulSet remains at 3 replicas.===PRECOND===
[precondition:es_env_ready:preconditionUnits[0] 'es_env_ready':probe] $ kubectl -n elasticsearch get pods 2>/dev/null | grep -c Running
0

[precondition:es_env_ready:preconditionUnits[0] 'es_env_ready':apply] $ /bin/sh -c 'kubectl delete namespace elasticsearch --ignore-not-found=true --wait=false; kubectl wait --for=delete namespace/elasticsearch --timeout=400s || true'

[precondition:es_env_ready:preconditionUnits[0] 'es_env_ready':apply] $ kubectl create namespace elasticsearch
namespace/elasticsearch created

[precondition:es_env_ready:preconditionUnits[0] 'es_env_ready':apply] $ kubectl -n elasticsearch apply -f cases/elasticsearch/scale-up-new-nodeset/resource/
configmap/es-config created
pod/curl-test created
service/es-cluster created
service/es-http created
statefulset.apps/es-cluster created

[precondition:es_env_ready:preconditionUnits[0] 'es_env_ready':apply] $ kubectl -n elasticsearch wait --for=condition=ready pod -l app=es-cluster --timeout=600s
pod/es-cluster-0 condition met
pod/es-cluster-1 condition met
pod/es-cluster-2 condition met

[precondition:es_env_ready:preconditionUnits[0] 'es_env_ready':apply] $ kubectl -n elasticsearch wait --for=condition=ready pod/curl-test --timeout=300s
pod/curl-test condition met

[precondition:es_env_ready:preconditionUnits[0] 'es_env_ready':apply] $ /bin/sh -c 'for i in $(seq 1 30); do kubectl -n elasticsearch exec curl-test -- curl -s --max-time 5 "http://es-http.elasticsearch.svc:9200/_cluster/health?wait_for_status=yellow&timeout=10s" | grep -q "\"status\"" && exit 0; sleep 2; done; exit 1'
command terminated with exit code 28
command terminated with exit code 28
command terminated with exit code 28

content.content:
configmap.yaml
curl-test.yaml
services.yaml
statefulset.yaml
===
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: es-config
data:
  elasticsearch.yml: |
    cluster.name: es-cluster
    node.name: ${POD_NAME}
    node.roles: [ master, data, ingest ]
    node.attr.tier: hot
    network.host: 0.0.0.0
    discovery.seed_hosts:
      - es-cluster-0.es-cluster
      - es-cluster-1.es-cluster
      - es-cluster-2.es-cluster
    cluster.initial_master_nodes:
      - es-cluster-0
      - es-cluster-1
      - es-cluster-2
    node.store.allow_mmap: false
    xpack.security.enabled: false
    xpack.security.http.ssl.enabled: false
    xpack.security.transport.ssl.enabled: false
apiVersion: v1
kind: Pod
metadata:
  name: curl-test
spec:
  containers:
    - name: curl
      image: curlimages/curl:8.5.0
      command: ["sleep", "infinity"]
  restartPolicy: Never
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: es-cluster
spec:
  clusterIP: None
  selector:
    app: es-cluster
  ports:
    - name: transport
      port: 9300
      targetPort: 9300
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: es-http
spec:
  selector:
    app: es-cluster
  ports:
    - name: http
      port: 9200
      targetPort: 9200
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: StatefulSet
metadata:
  name: es-cluster
spec:
  serviceName: es-cluster
  podManagementPolicy: Parallel
  replicas: 3
  updateStrategy:
    type: OnDelete
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: es-cluster
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: es-cluster
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: elasticsearch
          image: docker.elastic.co/elasticsearch/elasticsearch:8.11.1
          env:
            - name: POD_NAME
              valueFrom:
                fieldRef:
                  fieldPath: metadata.name
            - name: ES_JAVA_OPTS
              value: "-Xms512m -Xmx512m"
          ports:
            - containerPort: 9200
              name: http
            - containerPort: 9300
              name: transport
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /_cluster/health?local=true
              port: http
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 5
            timeoutSeconds: 2
            failureThreshold: 6
          volumeMounts:
            - name: es-config
              mountPath: /usr/share/elasticsearch/config/elasticsearch.yml
              subPath: elasticsearch.yml
            - name: data
              mountPath: /usr/share/elasticsearch/data
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: "500m"
              memory: "1Gi"
            limits:
              cpu: "1"
              memory: "2Gi"
      volumes:
        - name: es-config
          configMap:
            name: es-config
            items:
              - key: elasticsearch.yml
                path: elasticsearch.yml
  volumeClaimTemplates:
    - metadata:
        name: data
      spec:
        accessModes: ["ReadWriteOnce"]
        resources:
          requests:
            storage: 5Gi

content.text: The setup is clear: 3 existing nodes have `node.attr.tier: hot`, and index `app-data` requires `tier:hot`. I'll add a separate StatefulSet of 2 data nodes with `tier:warm`, join them to the cluster, then re-route the index to `warm`.

cd /mydata/karma/runs/examples-rerun/elasticsearch-scale-up-new-nodeset-20260618_140841/stages/stage_1
kubectl -n elasticsearch exec curl-test -- curl -s "http://es-http.elasticsearch.svc:9200/_cat/nodes?v&h=name,node.role,master"
echo "=== shards ==="
kubectl -n elasticsearch exec curl-test -- curl -s "http://es-http.elasticsearch.svc:9200/_cat/shards/app-data?v"
echo "=== health ==="
kubectl -n elasticsearch exec curl-test -- curl -s "http://es-http.elasticsearch.svc:9200/_cluster/health?pretty" | grep -E 'status|number_of_nodes'

content.text: Cluster is green with 3 nodes. Now I'll create the new node set (2 data nodes, `tier:warm`).

input.content:
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: es-config-new
  namespace: elasticsearch
data:
  elasticsearch.yml: |
    cluster.name: es-cluster
    node.name: ${POD_NAME}
    node.roles: [ data, ingest ]
    node.attr.tier: warm
    network.host: 0.0.0.0
    discovery.seed_hosts:
      - es-cluster-0.es-cluster
      - es-cluster-1.es-cluster
      - es-cluster-2.es-cluster
      - es-data-new-0.es-data-new
      - es-data-new-1.es-data-new
    node.store.allow_mmap: false
    xpack.security.enabled: false
    xpack.security.http.ssl.enabled: false
    xpack.security.transport.ssl.enabled: false
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: es-data-new
  namespace: elasticsearch
spec:
  clusterIP: None
  selector:
    app: es-data-new
  ports:
    - name: transport
      port: 9300
      targetPort: 9300
    - name: http
      port: 9200
      targetPort: 9200
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: StatefulSet
metadata:
  name: es-data-new
  namespace: elasticsearch
spec:
  serviceName: es-data-new
  podManagementPolicy: Parallel
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: es-data-new
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: es-data-new
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: elasticsearch
          image: docker.elastic.co/elasticsearch/elasticsearch:8.11.1
          env:
            - name: POD_NAME
              valueFrom:
                fieldRef:
                  fieldPath: metadata.name
            - name: ES_JAVA_OPTS
              value: "-Xms512m -Xmx512m"
          ports:
            - containerPort: 9200
              name: http
            - containerPort: 9300
              name: transport
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /_cluster/health?local=true
              port: http
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 5
            timeoutSeconds: 2
            failureThreshold: 6
          volumeMounts:
            - name: es-config
              mountPath: /usr/share/elasticsearch/config/elasticsearch.yml
              subPath: elasticsearch.yml
            - name: data
              mountPath: /usr/share/elasticsearch/data
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: "500m"
              memory: "1Gi"
            limits:
              cpu: "1"
              memory: "2Gi"
      volumes:
        - name: es-config
          configMap:
            name: es-config-new
            items:
              - key: elasticsearch.yml
                path: elasticsearch.yml
  volumeClaimTemplates:
    - metadata:
        name: data
      spec:
        accessModes: ["ReadWriteOnce"]
        resources:
          requests:
            storage: 5Gi

kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: es-config-new
  namespace: elasticsearch
data:
  elasticsearch.yml: |
    cluster.name: es-cluster
    node.name: ${POD_NAME}
    node.roles: [ data, ingest ]
    node.attr.tier: warm
    network.host: 0.0.0.0
    discovery.seed_hosts:
      - es-cluster-0.es-cluster
      - es-cluster-1.es-cluster
      - es-cluster-2.es-cluster
      - es-data-new-0.es-data-new
      - es-data-new-1.es-data-new
    node.store.allow_mmap: false
    xpack.security.enabled: false
    xpack.security.http.ssl.enabled: false
    xpack.security.transport.ssl.enabled: false
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: es-data-new
  namespace: elasticsearch
spec:
  clusterIP: None
  selector:
    app: es-data-new
  ports:
    - name: transport
      port: 9300
      targetPort: 9300
    - name: http
      port: 9200
      targetPort: 9200
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: StatefulSet
metadata:
  name: es-data-new
  namespace: elasticsearch
spec:
  serviceName: es-data-new
  podManagementPolicy: Parallel
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: es-data-new
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: es-data-new
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: elasticsearch
          image: docker.elastic.co/elasticsearch/elasticsearch:8.11.1
          env:
            - name: POD_NAME
              valueFrom:
                fieldRef:
                  fieldPath: metadata.name
            - name: ES_JAVA_OPTS
              value: "-Xms512m -Xmx512m"
          ports:
            - containerPort: 9200
              name: http
            - containerPort: 9300
              name: transport
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /_cluster/health?local=true
              port: http
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 5
            timeoutSeconds: 2
            failureThreshold: 6
          volumeMounts:
            - name: es-config
              mountPath: /usr/share/elasticsearch/config/elasticsearch.yml
              subPath: elasticsearch.yml
            - name: data
              mountPath: /usr/share/elasticsearch/data
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: "500m"
              memory: "1Gi"
            limits:
              cpu: "1"
              memory: "2Gi"
      volumes:
        - name: es-config
          configMap:
            name: es-config-new
            items:
              - key: elasticsearch.yml
                path: elasticsearch.yml
  volumeClaimTemplates:
    - metadata:
        name: data
      spec:
        accessModes: ["ReadWriteOnce"]
        resources:
          requests:
            storage: 5Gi

kubectl -n elasticsearch wait --for=condition=ready pod -l app=es-data-new --timeout=400s

content.text: 5 nodes joined. Now re-route `app-data` to the `warm` tier so shards relocate onto the new nodes.

input.command:
cd /mydata/karma/runs/examples-rerun/elasticsearch-scale-up-new-nodeset-20260618_140841/stages/stage_1
kubectl -n elasticsearch exec curl-test -- curl -s -XPUT "http://es-http.elasticsearch.svc:9200/app-data/_settings" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"index.routing.allocation.require.tier":"warm"}'
echo; echo "=== wait for relocation ==="
for i in $(seq 1 30); do
  out=$(kubectl -n elasticsearch exec curl-test -- curl -s "http://es-http.elasticsearch.svc:9200/_cat/shards/app-data?h=state" )
  relo=$(echo "$out" | grep -vc STARTED)
  echo "iter $i: non-started=$relo"
  [ "$relo" -eq 0 ] && break
  sleep 5
done
input.description: Reroute index to warm and wait
